title: Order Management and Client Communication
description: Ground truth: every atomic requirement from Chapter 9, manually verified word-by-word

requirements.text: Primary order channel: B2B portal
Secondary order channel: email
Email orders are interpreted by the system using AI-based processing
Order channels are B2B context — not end-consumer
Email channel is hierarchically secondary to portal — priority ordering
Email processing capability (system must be able to process emails)
Order recognition (identifying that an incoming email contains an order)
AI-based data extraction from emails
Product code recognition from email orders
Quantity recognition from email orders
Deadline recognition from email orders
System may send automatic confirmation — optional (may ≠ must)
Confirmation must consider wood stock levels
Confirmation must consider CNC capacity
Confirmation must consider finishing/coating time
Confirmation must consider delivery schedule
When raw material is in stock, immediate confirmation can be given
When deadline cannot be met, propose alternative date
When deadline cannot be met, send warning to client
Request project manager approval when needed
System must determine when project manager approval is needed — decision logic
System will NOT have a general communication module
NOT a goal: general CRM communication
requirements.signal: two exclusions in a single sentence

requirements.text: NOT a goal: general email template editing
Communication is exclusively tied to order intake and order fulfillment
Permitted communication topic: order intake
Permitted communication topic: order clarification (material, color, dimensions)
Permitted communication topic: order confirmation
Permitted communication topic: production deadline
Permitted communication topic: feasibility based on materials/production/finishing
Permitted communication topic: delivery or on-site pickup coordination
Permitted communication topic: order fulfillment status communication
Permitted communication topic: system messages related to proforma invoices, advance payments, and billing process initiation
Client management is NOT a classic sales CRM
No AI feature needed: next step suggestion
requirements.signal: three exclusions in one sentence, listed as examples

requirements.text: No AI feature needed: general email draft generation
No AI feature needed: proactive sales suggestions
Client data management scope: order intake
requirements.signal: four scope items in a single sentence

requirements.text: Client data management scope: production tracking
Client data management scope: delivery
Client data management scope: partner relationship management
